title: Add SELinux label selection code to pkg/utils.go
body:
We need this code in order to get it shared in CRI-O.
I do not want to vender libpod 2.0 into CRI-O yet, since
it is not released. This code is not used in podman in
v1.9.0 so this will not break anything.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Sure, will have to do this in master as well.
